title: wolfhsm crypto: SHA, CMAC, HKDF, RNG
description: sha.rs: HsmSha256/384/512<'a> each holding client ref and internal wc_Sha* state; implement digest::Update + digest::FixedOutput + digest::Digest; use wh_Client_Sha*UpdateRequest/FinalRequest for streaming, wolfhsm_sha256 shim for one-shot. cmac.rs: CmacKey{id:KeyId} with generate(bits), load(label), compute(data)->[u8;16] via wolfhsm_cmac shim. hkdf.rs: make_cache_key(hash_type,salt_key_id?,ikm_key_id,info,target_len)->KeyId; make_export_key(same args)->Vec<u8>. rng.rs: generate(size)->Vec<u8>.
